task.name: Fixture Task Hello
task.objective: Minimal standalone task used to verify the task-runner.xml structural tests. Produces a one-line greeting output.

llm.mandate: You are executing a fixture task. Do exactly what the flow says, nothing more.
Report all findings. Do not stop at the first error.

step.title: Generate greeting
step.action: Produce a single greeting string of the form: "Hello from task-hello."
